HOOK · Separating Mixtures (4 Methods)
分离混合物（四种方法）
HOOK
•
Real-world anchor — turning seawater into drinking water.
真实世界引子——把海水变成能喝的水。
•
On many coasts, people cannot drink the sea: it is salty water, a mixture of salt dissolved in water.
海水是盐溶在水里的混合物,不能直接喝。
•
To get clean drinking water they must SEPARATE the salt from the water.
要喝,就得把盐和水分开。
•
How?
怎么分?CAREER/GLOBAL desalination (global commons — coasts worldwide).opening story / flesh → B1b. Skeleton states direction only.
LEARN · Separating Mixtures (4 Methods)
分离混合物（四种方法）
LEARN
•
Separation methods are
分离方法是"物理方法"——不改变物质本身,只是把它们分开。
•
P
KEY POINT (accurate): mixtures can be separated by physical meansbecause the substances are not chemically joined.BOUNDARY chemical change is NOT separation (→ later units).
•
H
•
Y
•
S
•
I
•
CAL — they do not change what the substances are; they only move them apart.
•
Filtration — separates an insoluble solid from a liquid.
过滤——把不溶的固体从液体里分出来。
•
Evaporation — gets a dissolved solid back from a solution.
蒸发——把溶解了的固体从溶液里拿回来。
•
Distillation — gets a pure liquid back from a solution.
蒸馏——把纯液体从溶液里取回来。
•
Using a magnet — separates a magnetic solid from a non-magnetic one.
用磁铁——把有磁性的固体从没磁性的分出来。
🔴 RED CARD · 误区红牌
✘
Filtration removes dissolved salt.
过滤能滤掉溶解的盐
✔
Dissolved salt passes straight through the filter paper with the water. Filtration only catches solids that did NOT dissolve.
溶解的盐会跟水一起穿过滤纸。过滤只挡住"没溶解"的固体。
•
Distillation involves boiling — wear eye protection and keep hands away from the hot apparatus.
安全提醒:蒸馏要烧开液体——戴护目镜,手别碰烫的器材。

分离混合物（四种方法）

(a) 蒸发。(b) 糖已经溶解，会跟水一起穿过滤纸。

WRAP · Separating Mixtures (4 Methods)
分离混合物（四种方法）
WRAP
📝 SUMMARY · 总结
•
Four physical methods: filtration (insoluble solid + liquid), evaporation (get dissolved solid back), distillation (get pure liquid back), magnet (magnetic + non-magnetic solids).
四招物理分离:过滤、蒸发、蒸馏、磁铁。
📝 SUMMARY · 总结
•
We separated mixtures without changing the particles.
我们分开了混合物,没改变粒子本身。
•
Now back to the particles themselves — in solids, liquids and gases, how are the particles arranged?
下一课回到粒子——固体、液体、气体里,粒子是怎么排的?L07 → L08 (Particle Arrangement).
•
•
真实蒸馏不是100%纯,沸点接近的杂质会一起蒸出来。
•
要真纯要重复蒸馏。
•
after LEARN L2 (distillation) or as a TEST-area side box.NEW GAP POINT FOUND THIS none beyond #10. (No new note to save.)
•
•
•
(b) 蒸发。
•
•
1 mark: (a) filtration removes the insoluble sand first.
•
1 mark: (b) evaporation gets the dry salt back from the remaining salt water.
•
•
1 分：(a) 先用过滤去掉不溶解的沙。
•
1 分：(b) 再用蒸发从剩下的盐水里拿回干盐。
•
filtration
•
filtering
•
use filter paper
•
pass it through a filter
•
(b) ACCEPT only for part (b):
•
evaporation
•
evaporate the water
•
heat it until the water leaves
•
leave dry salt after the water evaporates
•
过滤
•
用滤纸过滤
•
把混合物倒过滤纸
•
先把沙滤出来
•
(b) 只用于 (b) 的可接受答案：
•
蒸发
•
把水蒸发掉
•
加热盐水直到水离开
•
水蒸发后留下干盐
•
(a) REJECT for part (a):
•
evaporation — wrong for (a) because evaporation is for dissolved salt, not for removing insoluble sand first.
•
distillation — wrong for (a) because the first step is only to remove sand.
•
magnet — wrong for (a) because sand is not magnetic.
•
(b) REJECT for part (b):
•
filtration — wrong for (b) because dissolved salt passes through filter paper.
•
magnet — wrong for (b) because salt is not magnetic.
•
distillation — wrong for (b) if the aim is dry salt, not collecting water.
•
(a) 只用于 (a) 的拒绝答案：
•
蒸发：错，因为 (a) 要先去掉不溶解的沙；蒸发是处理溶解的盐。
•
蒸馏：错，因为第一步只是去掉沙，不是收集水。
•
磁铁：错，因为沙没有磁性。
•
(b) 只用于 (b) 的拒绝答案：
•
过滤：错，因为溶解的盐会穿过滤纸。
•
磁铁：错，因为盐没有磁性。
•
蒸馏：错，因为 (b) 要干盐，不是要收集水。
•
Mark by subpart. Do not flatten the lists. Evaporation is wrong for (a) but correct for (b); filtration is correct for (a) but wrong for (b).Correct — first filter out insoluble sand, then evaporate the remaining salt water to get dry salt.对。
•
先过滤掉不溶的沙，再蒸发剩下的盐水拿回干盐。
•
Wrong — keep the order: insoluble sand first, dissolved salt second.还不对。
•
顺序要记住：先处理不溶的沙，再处理溶解的盐。
•
•
Ignore spelling or grammar errors if the science meaning is still clear.
•
Ignore extra words that do not contradict the answer.
•
•
拼写或语法小错，但科学意思清楚，可以忽略。
•
多余文字只要不和答案冲突，可以忽略。
•
Accept minor spelling errors only when the intended term is unambiguous; do not accept a misspelling that becomes another science word or symbol.小拼错但看得懂可收；如果变成另一个科学词或符号，不收。
•
true if blank, unreadable, mixed correct and incorrect, or not covered by the accept/reject lists.high when answer matches listed accept/reject; low answers go to teacher review, not guessed.Round 3 only — cleaned Chinese marking text and kept marking tied to this question.
🔁 COVER & RECALL · 盖住回想
(a) Filtration. (b) Evaporation.
(a) 过滤。(b) 蒸发。
